user.title: Marstek Battery
user.description: Searching for Marstek devices on your network...

pick_device.title: Select Device
pick_device.description: Select a discovered Marstek device or enter the IP address manually.

manual.title: Connect to Marstek Battery
manual.description: Enter the IP address and UDP port of your Marstek device. The Open API must be enabled in the Marstek app first.

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to device. Verify IP, port, and that the Open API is enabled.
error.invalid_ip: Only private/local IP addresses are allowed.
